学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Jiaotong University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranked approximately 41st in the Soft Science China University Rankings, belonging to the top national science and engineering universities; System Science A+, Transportation Engineering A, Information and Communication Engineering A, Computer Science and Technology A-, Civil Engineering A-, Management Science and Engineering A-, among which Computer, Electronic Information, and Transportation categories are the university's flagship majors, highly matching the enrollment majors. Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other majors continue to be highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, highly aligned with BJTU's advantageous disciplines, potentially attracting more high-scoring candidates; the number of Physics Category candidates in Jiangxi Province in 2026 is approximately 268,000, slightly increased from 2025, with slightly intensified competition; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving historical laboratory safety incidents; Douyin popularity ranking is 45th, with relatively hot evaluations and certain social attention; no obvious enrollment cutoff gaps have been observed.
